headline: NVIDIA (NVDA): UBS Sees More Upside as AI Demand Stays Healthy
summary: NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) is one of billionaire Steve Cohen’s large-cap stock picks with the highest upside potential. On May 11, analysts at UBS reiterated a Buy rating on NVIDIA Corporation (NASDAQ:NVDA) and a $245 price target. The research firm remains bullish about Nvidia’s long-term outlook after the Taiwan Ministry of Finance announced April export data […]
